rows:
"1. Asmund was a Gothi (priest) in life                                                                        
2. He was killed at the age of 34 when his village was burned (he was embraced, but left sitting up in a grave, he believes himself to be a Dragir - Revenenant)                                                                        
3. He believes his skill with Necromancy is because of his dead soul, both blessed and cursed by the gods                                                                        
4. He traveled Europe seeking out other Dragir, he met many, they are not as closely tied to the gods as he, and most in fact are at this point believers in the White God                                                                        
5. He served many lords through Europe, he did not settle down for long as most did not want him in their domain.                                                                         
6. He stayed with many Cappadocians over the years, and fought with them against the Giovanni for many years, then when they were losing he decided that they were not blessed of the gods and turned on them                                                                        
7. He traveled Africa for a few Centuries ending up eventually in England during the Victorian years.  He stumbled across one of Alices kills and investigated why.  He embraced her after four months of observation.                                                                        
8. Left Alice after a period of three years to make her way in the world.                                                                          
9. Has been in the Caribbean since, he has been working with the Setites and Serpents of Light, and against them as his whims take him.                                                                        
10. Has been drawn to LA by the death energies, he wants to meet a Demon of the White God but is not suicidal.                                                                          "
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

3. He believes his skill with Necromancy is because of his dead soul, both blessed and cursed by the gods

5. He served many lords through Europe, he did not settle down for long as most did not want him in their domain.                                                                         
6. He stayed with many Cappadocians over the years, and fought with them against the Giovanni for many years, then when they were losing he decided that they were not blessed of the gods and turned on them                                                                        
7. He traveled Africa for a few Centuries ending up eventually in England during the Victorian years.  He stumbled across one of Alices kills and investigated why.  He embraced her after four months of observation.                                                                        
8. Left Alice after a period of three years to make her way in the world.

rows: In regards to the Iron Kingdom, he has minor sway with the Penitent Legion as he regualrily trades with them.
He is known to deal fairly with individuals he deems worthy
He is equally known to kill and destroy wraiths he deems problems or unworthy
He is a known enslaver of wraiths as are his brood
He was notorious for recruiting wraiths to inhabit bodies and use them as soldiers for several hundred years
He maintains a guard of 4 powerful wraiths as his personal servants
He has between 1 and 10 zombies at most times around his lair
He seems to walk the lands of the dead with no fear
He has been challenged by powerful wraiths before and defeated them, he has not been challenged in at least 100 years
It is not know if he pays off or makes deals with the heirarchy or they are scared of him.
He can destroy wraiths in the real world or the shadow lands.
He has been known to go on hunting parties with his childer at times.
He has offered his lands as shelter to all wraiths who will pay him due respect.  As his lands are not to be harvested by the DKOJ for 20 years this is an appealing offer.
He currently occupies the territory known as "City Terrace" in Los Angeles, having moved his forces from Downey in the past few days (as of April 19 2017)

He is known to have dealings with the Dark Kingdom of Ivory and have made deals with higly placed wraiths there.  Certain factions who oppose the current structure and are willing to embrace slavery have worked with him for Centuries.

rows: Each item has a tag with it listing the title in Enlish typed in block letters
Tales of the first city by its true name (ubar)
A path for cultists to discover power in true demons
Supposed tract written with an angels guidance about faith and correct behavior
Tales of a methuselah and her progenitor (probably Arikel) during the second city
A study of Elementary Creationism in the Modern Cainite
15th century treatise written by a Tzimisce (Luthven, 6th gen) on the children of Caine and the study of how the Tremere came to be.
Stories and Apocrypha about the second generation Cainites Irad and Adah (remember that Adah does not fit common legend)
Heavily religous tract about the Road of Prophecy (or scrying, sight, divination, divine proclamation), all about gods vision as it is channeled through the faithful
Faith and Fortune, or how that bitch took it all away.
A collection of diary entries by a ghoul over 800 year, to Ventrue "Helena the Armenian"
Book written on living plant matter
Dark Reaches of the third layer of Reality
Supposed story of the exploration of a Cave system in Turkey and discovery of a Temple
Tales of and how tos of the Mortal Inquisition of the Middle Ages to combat evil
Movement of the Mind, Path of Mars, Hands of Destruction, Lure of Flames, says its from Ceoris written by LeDuc
A story by an Assamite Seer of Haqims truth, and the tests he will put to his clan
Stories of the Rebels against G-d and their seeming fate, then newfound hope
How to be who you should be in the hope of who you will want to be.
Finding out your true self with the help of a master who wants you to succeed
Stories of the lost tribe of the Weeping Master
A short study of the foundation
How G-d came to create the world and why, supposedly dictated by a Efreet
Under the mountain our founder left us in.
Stories of Cappadocious and the fate of most of his Clan from 1500BC to 500 AD
Dark and Stormy Reaches of the Never Never
Stories of the Near Dreaming and many of the dark places and things therein
book written on obsidian (malleable rock) paper
Ascribed Tales / Fanciful Stories / Descriptions of  - the creatures and ruling groups of the dark continent
Story of a man who redeemed his soul from a demon
Noddist tales from Cappadocians in the middle ages, not as complete as book of nod, but contains some things it does not
The Cycle of Life and Death
A tract on the afterlife discussing the foundation, powers, purpose of the Benandanti
Tabula from the Second City listing the Laws of Caine
